labels.name: parity-audit
labels.description: 由 parity-audit-skill 自动产出/管理

labels.name: area:player
labels.description: 播放器/迷你播放器相关

labels.name: area:plugin
labels.description: 插件管理 / 订阅相关

labels.name: kind:ui-gap
labels.description: RN/Android UI 视觉或布局差异

labels.name: kind:logic-gap
labels.description: 业务逻辑/交互行为差异

labels.name: kind:missing-feature
labels.description: Android 侧缺失 RN 已有功能

labels.name: kind:perf
labels.description: 性能 / 耗时显著差异

labels.name: kind:error-divergence
labels.description: 错误处理或降级行为差异

labels.name: needs-retry
labels.description: 需要下一轮 audit 再次确认稳定性

labels.name: flaky-flow
labels.description: Maestro flow 不稳，需修 selector

labels.name: manual-dedup-required
labels.description: 指纹命中多个 Issue，需人工裁决
